title: Permanent residence :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
Permanent residence is usually the next step after residence. You can live and work in New Zealand indefinitely and come and go as you like.
- Becoming a permanent resident of New Zealand You can live in New Zealand permanently on a resident visa, but there are rules about travelling. If you then get a Permanent Resident Visa, you can travel in and out of New Zealand any time.

## Becoming a permanent resident of New Zealand
You can live in New Zealand permanently on a resident visa, but there are rules about travelling. If you then get a Permanent Resident Visa, you can travel in and out of New Zealand any time.
- Showing your commitment to New Zealand for permanent residence When you apply for permanent residence, you must show us that you are committed to living in New Zealand permanently.

## Showing your commitment to New Zealand for permanent residence
When you apply for permanent residence, you must show us that you are committed to living in New Zealand permanently.
